channel.title: Posts on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: Interview Prep
item.description: Read Aziz, Lee, and Prakash’s Elements of programming Interviews in Python, also available for other languages. Read Gayle McDowell’s Cracking the Coding Interview: 189 Programming Questions and Solutions Do as many Leetcode problems as you can Practice with other job-seekers on Pramp.com (practice makes perfect) As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases

item.title: DACA Timeline
item.description: A timelapse of the legal battles that have been tormenting me in the past couple of years.
